controls.title: Narrative Definition and Core Extraction
controls.text: AI agents deconstruct the narrative into load-bearing truths: people, events, claims, causal links, and evidence anchors. Step 1: Linguistic breakdown — extract entities and relations, separate core drivers from supporting detail. Step 2: Canon Registry commit — push core structure into the Narrative Canon Registry, hash committed state and anchor to ledger. Step 3: Critical-impact labeling — tag collapse-risk elements (identity, motive, causality). Attestation: Dual-agent validation with replay check; variance above 2 percent triggers adjudication.

controls.title: Template Standardization — Storyform Canon
controls.text: Lock the narrative skeleton into standard slots to prevent distortion. Step 1: Populate Storyform schema (roles, arcs, time order, claims). Step 2: Narrative fitness tests for explainability, verifiability, and updateability. Attestation: Structure-coherence agent confirms no orphan events or contradictions; remediation proposals are logged and attested.

controls.title: Continuous Attested Review
controls.text: Every modification is checked against canon deltas. Step 1: Diff integrity — compare commit N vs commit N+1 and flag semantic displacement or propaganda patterns. Step 2: Narrative drift prevention — detect meaning shift, not just text change. Attestation: Certificates per change; drift above threshold triggers rollback and alert.

controls.title: Full Edit History and Audit Defense
controls.text: Forensic traceability for every change. Step 1: Tamper-proof log — every change signed by actor (AI, human, or agent ID) and anchored to Canon Ledger (SCITT/DBoM compatible). Step 2: Accountability map — reconstruct causality of changes and influence. Attestation: Dual-agent verification for accuracy and intent; anomalies raise governance alerts.

controls.title: Flexibility Without Core Erosion
controls.text: Allow evolution while protecting the core. Step 1: Bayesian alignment — accept new claims only if evidence-supported. Step 2: Canon expansion protocol — new elements require evidence-first commits. Attestation: Justification score required; weak evidence is rejected.

controls.title: Legal Compliance Enforcement
controls.text: Checks: GDPR, IP rights, records retention, sector regulations (banking, public sector), personal data exposure. Attestation: Lawful to publish, retain, and edit. Every narrative published through the node must pass legal compliance review before attestation is issued.

controls.title: Ethical Alignment Governance
controls.text: Checks: Bias, dignity, harm potential, equity, local cultural context. Attestation: Narrative ethically valid. Ethical review considers the full context of the community the node serves, not only universal standards.

controls.title: Narrative Sovereignty and Consent
controls.text: Rules: Stakeholder ownership respected; no narrative imposed without consent. Attestation: Agency preserved. The node steward holds final authority over what narratives are anchored under their node identity.

controls.title: Stakeholder Participation Proof
controls.text: Actions: Custodians sign changes; role-based approvals enforced; consent trails preserved. Attestation: Authorized source of truth. Every significant narrative commit requires traceable stakeholder participation before ledger anchoring.

controls.title: Risk and Misuse Classification
controls.text: Identify: Weaponization attempts, propaganda patterns, cognitive attack vectors. Attestation: Narrative not under adversarial manipulation. Threat scoring (ThreatScore) determines precision mode: Iron Canon (>=0.8), Defensive Flex (0.3-0.8), Adaptive Growth (<0.3).

controls.title: Precision Mode: Iron Canon
controls.text: Trigger: ThreatScore >= 0.8. Behavior: Zero drift; reject unfamiliar claims. Approver: Autonomous AI. Applied when the narrative is under active threat or high-confidence manipulation is detected. All changes require maximum attestation before any modification is permitted.

controls.title: Precision Mode: Defensive Flex
controls.text: Trigger: ThreatScore 0.3 to 0.8. Behavior: Minor truthful growth allowed. Approver: AI plus authorized stakeholder. Balances narrative protection with the ability to incorporate well-evidenced new information under joint human-AI oversight.

controls.title: Precision Mode: Adaptive Growth
controls.text: Trigger: ThreatScore < 0.3. Behavior: Rapid evidence-first evolution. Approver: Stakeholder consent required. Used in low-threat conditions to allow the narrative to evolve quickly in response to new verified information, with stakeholder authorization at each significant commit.
